display.purpose: Page titles only. One per page. Outfit 900 at fluid size.

title.purpose: Large stat values in card contexts (.s-val). Outfit 800 at 32px.

body.purpose: All prose, descriptions, notes. Inter 400 at 14px. Max 65ch.

label.purpose: Data classifiers, badges, supertitles. JetBrains Mono 700 at 11px, ALL CAPS, 2px tracking.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Applied to .s-card on hover, alongside translateY(-8px). Flat at rest.

shadows.name: button-glow
shadows.purpose: Resting glow on primary button. Hover intensifies to 0 8px 25px rgba(99,102,241,0.40).

shadows.name: button-glow-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover state of primary button glow.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Input focus ring. Thin, indigo-tinted, non-distracting.

shadows.name: xp-glow
shadows.purpose: Slider thumb glow on XP sliders.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Existing --ease var. Material standard curve. Used across most transitions.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Preferred ease-out for new work per impeccable guidelines. Snappier exits.

motion.name: ease-lift
motion.purpose: Card hover lift and button hover. Slight overshoot for physical feel.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: State transitions: border color, background, nav hover.

motion.name: duration-lift
motion.purpose: Card hover lift. Slow enough to feel physical.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Full dashboard layout. Sidebar always visible.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action per screen. Gradient fill, ambient glow, physical hover lift.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@600&display=swap'); .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1, #a855f7); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 24px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(99,102,241,0.25); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.175,0.885,0.32,1.275), box-shadow 0.3s ease, filter 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.01); box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(99,102,241,0.40); filter: brightness(1.1); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Subdued ghost button. Does not compete with primary.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@600&display=swap'); .ds-btn-secondary { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #cbd5e1; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 24px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: none; transition: background 0.25s ease, border-color 0.25s ease, color 0.25s ease, transform 0.25s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-color: rgba(129,140,248,0.35); color: #e2e8f0; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Stat Card (Glass)
components.description: Primary data container. Glassmorphic surface, shimmer on hover, dramatic lift interaction.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@700&display=swap'); .ds-card-glass { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 20px; padding: 24px; text-align: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.175,0.885,0.32,1.275); } .ds-card-glass::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: -100%; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.05), transparent); transition: 0.5s; } .ds-card-glass:hover::before { left: 100%; } .ds-card-glass:hover { transform: translateY(-8px) rotateX(2deg); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.14); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .ds-card-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-card-value { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 32px; font-weight: 800; color: #f8fafc; line-height: 1; } .ds-card-sub { font-size: 13px; color: #475569; margin-top: 8px; }

components.name: Section Container
components.description: Secondary grouping surface. Opaque tonal background, no blur, no hover transform.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@800&family=Inter:wght@400&display=swap'); .ds-card-surface { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius: 18px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .ds-section-title { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: #f1f5f9; margin: 0 0 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Subtle dark input. Barely visible at rest, indigo focus ring on activation.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@700&display=swap'); .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; color: #64748b; } .ds-input { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius: 12px; color: #f1f5f9; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(129,140,248,0.40); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(129,140,248,0.10); }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Shimmer-animated indigo progress bar. Used for plan completion and habit tracking.
components.css: @keyframes ds-shimmer { 0% { background-position: -200% 0; } 100% { background-position: 200% 0; } } .ds-progress-track { height: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border-radius: 99px; overflow: hidden; margin: 10px 0; } .ds-progress-fill { height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #6366f1, #a855f7); border-radius: 99px; position: relative; transition: width 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-progress-fill::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.30), transparent); background-size: 200% 100%; animation: ds-shimmer 2.5s linear infinite; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation link. Subtle hover shift; active state uses indigo left-rail indicator.
components.html: DashboardTodayTimer
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;600&display=swap'); .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-link { display: block; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #94a3b8; padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 10px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease, color 0.3s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); transform: translateX(4px); color: #cbd5e1; } .ds-nav-link--active { background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(99,102,241,0.15), rgba(99,102,241,0.02)); box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #818cf8; color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: JetBrains Mono badge for labels, categories, and status indicators.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@600&display=swap'); .ds-badge { display: inline-block; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 6px; }

narrative.overview:
Prime Dashboard is a personal operating system, not a product to be sold. Like a pilot's cockpit or a professional athlete's training computer, every element on screen exists to help the user execute a plan: the dark glass stays out of the way, the data reads at a glance, the controls respond without hesitation. The aesthetic is earned discipline, not designed atmosphere.

The system draws from Linear and Raycast: precise spacing, a restrained palette anchored by one strong accent color, no surface decoration that doesn't carry information. This system explicitly rejects the corporate BI tool aesthetic and the generic SaaS dashboard pattern. Prime belongs to one person on one mission.

Prime is built in silence. Discipline = Freedom.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first: the scene forces the answer. A person at a desk or on a phone in focused work mode.
One accent, used sparingly: Focus Indigo carries CTAs, active states, and progress. Its rarity is its power.
Three-font system with distinct roles: Outfit for display energy, Inter for readable density, JetBrains Mono for data precision.
Flat at rest, dramatic on interaction: surfaces are tonal planes until touched.
Gamification that earns its place: XP, streaks, and level progress exist because the user earned them.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Focus Indigo (#6366f1) is used on 10% or fewer of any given screen's interactive elements. It marks the single most important action or the current state. When everything is accented, nothing is.

rules.name: The No Pure Black Rule
rules.body: #000 and #fff are forbidden. Every background uses Void or Deep Space; every text color uses the slate-text hierarchy.

rules.name: The Three-Font Boundary Rule
rules.body: Outfit is for display and section headers only. Inter is for body and UI copy. JetBrains Mono is for labels, badges, and numerical metadata. The three fonts signal three different types of information.

rules.name: The No Gradient Text Rule
rules.body: New screens should use #f8fafc for display titles. The existing .page-title gradient-text pattern is a legacy exception, not the standard.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: No component carries a resting shadow. Elevation is a response to state (hover, focus, active), not an ambient style.

rules.name: The Selective Glass Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter: blur() is used on .s-card stat cards and the sidebar only. Blur everywhere is noise; blur on the primary layer is signal.

dos: Do use Focus Indigo (#6366f1) exclusively for the primary action and active state on any screen.
Do keep card backgrounds in the rgba(255,255,255,0.02–0.06) range.
Do use JetBrains Mono for all numerical labels, badges, and data classifiers.
Do vary card types by content importance: .s-card (glass) for primary KPIs; .section-card (opaque) for secondary content.
Do use the three-step text hierarchy: #f8fafc for critical data, #94a3b8 for secondary copy, #64748b for metadata.
Do reserve the indigo-violet-pink gradient for progress bars and the XP system only.
Do write copy in the voice of the brand: direct, terse, no filler.
Do use semantic colors (Emerald, Amber, Crimson) as system state, not decoration.
donts: Don't use the Corporate BI tool aesthetic: no gray-heavy clinical layouts, no generic stat blocks that could belong to any company.
Don't add backdrop-filter: blur() to every surface. Glass is reserved for .s-card and the sidebar.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) on new screens.
Don't use identical card grids: same size, same structure, icon + heading + text, repeated.
Don't add a left or right border stripe (border-left: 4px solid accent) to cards or list items as decorative accent.
Don't use Outfit for body copy or JetBrains Mono for paragraph text.
Don't animate layout properties. Animate transform and opacity only.
Don't write hollow motivational copy. Feedback is direct and honest: the data speaks.
